commands.review_summary:
Adds shared gateway health auth diagnostics, probes reachability when health or doctor gateway RPCs fail before auth, and reuses the reachability classifier from gateway readiness.

PR surface: Source +81, Tests +104. Total +185 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current `main` can throw `GatewayCredentialsRequiredError` before websocket connection, and current `healthCommand` rethrows non-transport errors instead of reporting credentials-required diagnostics. I did not run a live command because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No repair lane: the PR already contains a focused implementation with no actionable patch defect found; remaining work is maintainer validation and optional broad proof.

target.title: fix: report gateway health auth diagnostics
target.body:
## Summary

- Keep the `callGateway` credential guard intact for real health/status RPCs, but recover the diagnostic path when that guard blocks `openclaw health` or doctor gateway health.
- Add a shared gateway probe reachability classifier that treats auth-close probe results like `gateway closed (1008): device identity required` as evidence that the Gateway is reachable.
- Reuse that classifier from gateway readiness instead of carrying duplicate probe-evidence logic.
- Report a clear credentials-required diagnostic for health/doctor instead of leaking the raw `GatewayCredentialsRequiredError`; `openclaw health` still exits nonzero because the health RPC did not authenticate.

Regression provenance:

- Introduced by `4252f07ff0f1b8a80eaadf77e96afa5aa65d2f90` (`fix: reduce gateway warning noise`) by Peter Steinberger on 2026-05-28, which added the pre-websocket credential guard.
- Error wrapping was later shaped by `7be08d03769f44e3beb68a2d75a9516a21db3cc7` (`fix(cli): keep agents delete local fallback`) by Vincent Koc on 2026-05-28/29.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/health.test.ts src/commands/doctor-gateway-health.test.ts src/commands/gateway-readiness.test.ts`
- `pnpm tsgo:core`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/commands/health.ts src/commands/doctor-gateway-health.ts src/commands/gateway-health-auth-diagnostic.ts src/commands/gateway-readiness.ts src/commands/health.test.ts src/commands/doctor-gateway-health.test.ts src/commands/gateway-readiness.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check src/commands/health.ts src/commands/doctor-gateway-health.ts src/commands/gateway-health-auth-diagnostic.ts src/commands/gateway-readiness.ts src/commands/health.test.ts src/commands/doctor-gateway-health.test.ts src/commands/gateway-readiness.test.ts && git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` clean: no accepted/actionable findings reported

Proof gap:

- `pnpm check:changed` could not start in this checkout because the local `../crabbox` binary is `0.16.0-114-ged8016f`, below the repo-required `>=0.22.0` Testbox sync contract.
target.author: romneyda
